title: Lead
description: Universal lead record schema for the XPS Intelligence Platform.

id.description: Unique lead identifier (integer from DB or string from scraper).

company_name.description: Alias for company, used by some scrapers and the PostgreSQL schema.

website.description: Company website URL (must include http:// or https://).

city.description: City where the business is located.

state.description: US state abbreviation (e.g. OH, AZ) or full name.

industry.description: Industry or trade category (e.g. Epoxy, Concrete, SurfacePrep).

category.description: Scraper-assigned category keyword; mirrors industry when not explicitly set.

keyword.description: Search keyword used to discover this lead.

rating.description: Business rating on a 0–5 scale (e.g. Google Maps star rating).

lead_score.description: Composite quality score (0–100) assigned by the scoring engine.

score.description: Alias for lead_score used in legacy pipeline stages.

tier.description: Lead priority tier: HOT ≥ 75, WARM ≥ 50, COLD < 50.

source.description: Data source identifier (e.g. google_maps, yelp, bing_maps).

date_scraped.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the lead was scraped.

date_discovered.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the lead was first discovered.

last_contacted.description: ISO 8601 date-time of the most recent outreach attempt.

_validation.description: Internal validation metadata attached by the validation pipeline.
